messages.content: hey, can you write a quick apology? like, someone accidentally bumped into someone else walking down the street. the person who bumped is named Jamal. keep it short & sweet.

Hey Jamal,  
I’m really sorry if I bumped into you earlier—it was completely accidental, and I totally understand if you’re upset. Let me know if there’s anything I can do to make it up to you! 😊

Next, I should express that it was an accident. Something like "It was completely accidental, and I totally understand if you're upset." That shows empathy. Then, offer to make it up to them. Maybe add a line about buying coffee or offering help.

I should check the tone. It needs to be sincere but not too formal. Avoid any jargon. Keep sentences short. Also, make sure the apology is clear and to the point. Maybe add an emoji to keep it light, like a smiley face.
